'''1e-XE''' was a white-banded [[MD-3 medical droid|MD3 pharmaceutical model]] [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]], the shorter of two droids that assisted [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] in the recuperation of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] when he escaped the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]]. Its speech protocols were severely limited in comparison with its counterpart, [[SH∑1-B]].

{{Droid-stub}}
